title: Zinnia microglossa

The genus Zinnia is further divided into several sections, with Z. microglossa placed within the section Zinnia. This classification is based on the plant's morphology, including its flower shape and arrangement, as well as its leaf structure. The exact classification of Zinnia microglossa may vary depending on the source and the specific botanical classification system used.
